key_findings: Customer support is unresponsive, ignoring refund requests and failing to provide cancellation assistance.
The 2020 updates have introduced significant usability issues, including jumbled lists and a messy interface.
Premium pricing is considered too high at approximately 910 INR per year.
The app suffers from persistent crashes that return even after following troubleshooting steps.
The app does not retain the last viewed list, requiring repeated taps to access the same list.
Users have difficulty canceling monthly subscriptions with no clear in-app option.
frequent_issues: Unresponsive or inadequate customer support
App crashes and performance instability
Updates degrading app functionality and organization
Difficulty managing subscriptions and payments
representative_quotes: I have been begging for a refund from this app for over a month and nobody is replying me
Very costly for the premium version (approx Indian Rupees 910 per year).
all the 2020 UPDATES have made a mess of things
Now they are all jumbled together and I can't find what I need.
every time I tap away from the app I have to tap again (after opening it again) to see the list.
How do to stop monthly payment because i don't use this app anymore
Now the crashes have returned! ... It crashed again

key_findings: Multiple users report app crashes and failure to start after setup.
Sync issues cause loss of tasks and data across devices.
Widgets display all tasks without category filtering, making them useless for specific lists.
Recent app updates introduced confusing and overly complex UI, leading to uninstalls.
Users experience tasks being randomly shuffled to the top each time the app is opened.
Payment options are limited; users request UPI support and monthly subscription plans.
frequent_issues: Sync and data loss problems across devices
Design flaws: widgets lacking category filtering and UI complexity after updates
Limited payment methods: no UPI and no monthly subscription option
representative_quotes: Constant crashing.
So much for multi-device sync.
Widgets are useless because they always show all tasks I have, regardless of category.
Lost all my lists when I was forced to give email address.
with the recurrent task do not work when I use desktop app it do not sync well and I lose many task
the recent updates made it all confusing and unnecessarily graphically complex.

key_findings: Design changes broke chronological task listing in widget and interface
Aggressive premium upgrade push frustrates free users
Reminder functionality unreliable: wrong times and no repeat after dismissal
Intrusive pop-up ads appear despite notification settings off
Subscription users directed to subscription page for basic features like recurring events
Landscape mode task creation became more cumbersome after redesign
frequent_issues: Design: tasks not listed chronologically after update
Price: aggressive premium upgrade prompts
Reliability: reminder malfunction (wrong time, no repeat)
Ads: unwanted pop-up despite notifications off
Support/subscription: paid users still asked to subscribe for features
representative_quotes: Pushing to hard for premium upgrade. Not interested anymore
i can't see my tasks laid out chronologically in an organized and pleasing way anymore
updated widget not listing tasks chronologically
Annoying pop up every morning on my phone even though I have the notification turned off
I WAS ABLE to create/edit a new task in ONE go (and in LANDSCAPE). It takes MORE moves now.
it kept directing me to the subscription page much to my disappointment
Once I click "Done", it sets the reminder the next day.... at 1am. ... it never reminded me again

key_findings: Widget design regression after update: shows tasks by category instead of day/priority.
Pricing model disliked: users prefer one-time payment or find premium unaffordable.
Limited payment methods: debit card not supported for premium upgrade in Pakistan.
Calendar integration issues: syncing problems and app crash when adding people to events.
Zapier integration not working for Hangouts scheduler.
Request for calendar feature improvement.
frequent_issues: Widget displays tasks by category instead of by day or priority.
Pricing and subscription cost concerns.
Payment method limitations for premium upgrade.
Calendar syncing issues.
App crashes when creating events with invites.
Integration issues with Zapier.
representative_quotes: Since the last update I can only see whole lists, not those I prioritized.
I am not sure who want to pay monthly fee for a to-do list app.
My debit card isn't supported it says..I live in Pakistan
I do have syncing issues for calendar events as well as a crash everytime I add people to invites when creating an event.
I really want an automatoc hangouts chat scheduled to be sent but when I tried to set it up on zapier, it doesnt work.
now app widget shows tasks by category not by next 7 days which has created a serious issue for me.
Love it!! But can't afford premium😞
All good. Should work on calendar

key_findings: Free version provides sufficient features for most users.
App helps users stay organized and track priorities effectively.
Pro version is considered too expensive for students.
App is simple, intuitive, and flexible with useful features like widgets, timeline, subtasks, and shopping list.
Users report increased productivity since using the app.
App prevents forgetting tasks and helps plan the day.
frequent_issues: Pro version cost is a barrier for students.
No other recurring issues reported across reviews.
representative_quotes: This app is awesome. I am currently using the free version and it had everything I need. It truly makes it easy for you to stai organized and not lose tracks of priorities.
Great app, helps me to plan my day ahead
The pro version is expesive for a student in my country.
It helps me so much now I can do what I have to do without forgotten anything It is so cool
Truly the best planning app! ... I love that you can see everythubg even in the smallest widget. ... I like the separate feature for the shopping list! This app is super flexible and intuitive!
